team_name: CRPF GTEMS - Government Tender Eligibility & Management System using AI Evaluation Engine
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders based on various criteria, produce explainable evaluation reports, and replace the entire manual process of government procurement.
optimization_claims: Completing a full tender evaluation in under 4 hours instead of 3 to 5 days.
Zero bidders silently disqualified due to evaluator oversight or OCR failure.
constraints_addressed: Average vs. single-year turnover under Ind AS
CA certificate membership number requirement per ICAI norms
ISO scope vs. tender scope mismatch detection
JV experience credit at configurable percentage
